description: Deterministic Python utility (non-LLM) using the resume_diffs JSON to patch the base_resume dictionary. Also integrated into the LangGraph as ApplyChangesNode.

userStories.title: Apply Changes Utility Function
userStories.description: As a system developer, I want a deterministic utility function that parses and applies JSON diffs to a base resume dictionary, so that I can safely modify the resume without risking LLM hallucinations or layout breakage.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario: Applying a valid replace diff
and Given a valid replace diff targeting a valid JSON path (e.g. professional_experience[0].highlights[0])
When the apply_diffs utility is called
Then the specific field in the dictionary is updated to the new_value
and Then the rest of the dictionary remains unchanged
Scenario: Applying a diff to an invalid path
Given an invalid JSON path in the diff
When the apply_diffs utility is called
Then it raises a clear error or logs a warning without crashing

tasks.description: Create a new python module (e.g., src/utils/diff_applier.py) for the utility.
Implement a helper function to parse JSON paths like 'professional_summary' or 'professional_experience[0].highlights[1]'.
Implement the main apply_diffs function that iterates through a list of diffs and applies them to a deep copy of the base_resume.
Write pytest unit tests to verify the deterministic application of diffs, including nested lists and dictionaries.

userStories.title: Integrate ApplyChangesNode into LangGraph
userStories.description: As a strategic job seeker, I want the LangGraph to automatically use the approved JSON diffs to modify my base resume into a tailored resume, so that I have a final document ready for PDF generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a sub-graph state containing a base_resume and resume_diffs
Then it calls the apply_diffs utility
and Then it updates the state with the resulting tailored_resume dictionary

tasks.description: Implement the ApplyChangesNode in src/nodes/child_nodes.py (or a dedicated file if preferred).
Register ApplyChangesNode in src/child_graph.py and set the routing logic so that when HumanReviewNode is approved, it flows here.
Write an integration test to ensure the node correctly updates the graph state with tailored_resume.
